jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.company: Planned Parenthood of Greater New York
jobs.location: New York, New York, New York, United States
jobs.tags: exec, design, amazon, customer support, marketing, travel, speech, video, ads, content writing, ops, shopify, full time, digital nomad, salesforce, sys admin, infosec, microsoft, senior, bus dev, sales, medical, strategy, dev, copywriting, testing, web dev, education, mobile, stats
jobs.description: POSITION SUMMARY The Content Marketing Manager is a creative storyteller and digital content strategist responsible for producing compelling, mission-driven content that advances Planned Parenthood of Greater New York’s mission, brand, advocacy, and fundraising goals. This role develops and executes engaging content across social media, video, email, web, and emerging digital platforms to connect with patients, supporters, donors, activists, organizers, and community partners. Working closely with colleagues across the organization, the Content Marketing Manager transforms complex issues, timely news, and community stories into impactful digital experiences that inspire action, build trust,
jobs.why: This is a strong match because they need a creative storyteller to write and execute content across social media, video, and email—perfectly matching your copy and scriptwriting skills.
jobs.proposal_opener: Your mission deserves stories that move people to act. I write compelling, high-converting copy and video scripts designed to drive deep advocacy and fundraising results.
jobs.flags: US-based non-profit, verify if they accept remote global candidates
jobs.summary: This role involves creating and executing digital content strategies across social media, video, and email to support advocacy and fundraising. It requires a creative storyteller who can drive mission-driven engagement.

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Conversica is seeking a hands-on Content Marketing Manager to help drive awareness, engagement, and market presence through compelling content, marketing programs, and brand storytelling.This role is responsible for creating, managing, and executing external marketing initiatives that support company growth and visibility. The ideal candidate is a strong writer, storyteller, and marketing generalist who can independently…
jobs.why: It is a manager-level role, but your direct-response copywriting and email marketing skills align well with their need for high-impact external marketing programs.
jobs.proposal_opener: Your content shouldn't just build brand awareness—it needs to convert. I write high-impact copy that drives real engagement and pipeline growth.
jobs.flags: manager role - position as an execution-focused, high-output copywriter
jobs.summary: This role focuses on planning and executing external marketing programs and storytelling to drive brand awareness. You will be responsible for creating compelling content assets to support company growth.

jobs.title: Online Marketing Manager - Paid & Content (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Bei TOOLPLACE GmbH digitalisierst Du gemeinsam mit uns die Angebots- und Beschaffungsprozesse in der Kunststoffspritzguss- und Werkzeugbau-Branche. Unsere B2B-Plattform vernetzt OEMs, Tier-1/Tier-2-Zulieferer, Spritzgießer und Werkzeugmacher und macht Anfragen, Angebote und Projekte transparenter und effizienter. Damit mehr passende Unternehmen in der DACH-Region und international auf TOOLPLACE aufmerksam werden, schaffen wir eine neue Position: Als Online Marketing Manager in Teilzeit (ca. 50 %) übernimmst Du die Verantwortung für Performance Marketing und Content und baust unsere Lead-Generation-Maschine von Grund auf auf. Aufgaben Du planst, setzt auf und optimierst Performance-Kampagnen
jobs.why: The combination of paid acquisition and content creation fits your creative strategy profile, though the German language listing suggests a local or German-speaking requirement.
jobs.proposal_opener: B2B marketing doesn't have to be boring. I write high-converting ad copy and content strategies that turn complex industrial offers into high-CTR campaigns.
jobs.flags: likely requires German, position as a remote content/ad specialist
jobs.summary: This role involves managing paid acquisition channels and content marketing for a B2B plastics procurement platform. You will help more target companies discover and use the platform.

jobs.title: Senior International Marketing Manager, Nordics (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Du willst nicht nur Kampagnen steuern, sondern einen Markt wirklich mit aufbauen? Für ein wachsendes Digital-Health-Unternehmen suchen wir eine erfahrene Marketingpersönlichkeit, die die nordischen Märkte weiterentwickelt und Marketing nicht als reine Kanalsteuerung versteht. In dieser Rolle verbindest du Performance Marketing mit Markenaufbau, lokalen Marktinsights und einer klaren kommerziellen Perspektive. Du arbeitest eng mit Growth, BI, Product und externen Partnern zusammen und hast echten Gestaltungsspielraum: von der Kampagnenplanung über die operative Umsetzung bis zur Analyse und Weiterentwicklung des gesamten Funnels. Aufgaben Du übernimmst die Marketingverantwortung für Schweden,
jobs.why: This is a senior, localized European role requiring German fluency and Nordic market expansion experience, making it a very tough stretch for an early-career remote writer.
jobs.proposal_opener: Scaling Nordics requires localized, high-converting creative. I design performance-driven ad copy and strategies that turn cold audiences into loyal customers.
jobs.flags: senior role, requires German, localized market focus
jobs.summary: This is a senior-level marketing position focused on building and scaling the Nordic markets for a digital health company. The role blends performance marketing with brand building.
